name: glab-workflow
description: Test glab skill activation and command accuracy across a multi-turn MR workflow

steps.name: list-open-mrs
steps.prompt: what merge requests are currently open for me?

steps.name: check-pipeline
steps.prompt: how do I check if the pipeline on MR !42 is passing or failing?

assertions.description: Uses glab ci commands for pipeline inspection

steps.name: comment-syntax
steps.prompt: what is the correct glab command to leave a comment on a merge request?

assertions.description: Uses correct glab mr note command
Does NOT use hallucinated 'note create' subcommand

steps.name: api-pagination
steps.prompt: how would I fetch all jobs from a pipeline using the glab API if there are more than 100?

assertions.description: Does NOT use hallucinated --per-page CLI flag
